label: 精准POI分布
description: 在指定坐标放置兴趣点，若坐标不在目标区域值内则BFS搜索整个网格找最近的合法格子，并从等距候选格中随机选取，支持多条规则批量放置。
description-en: Places POI points at given coordinates; if a coordinate does not match the target value, BFS searches the entire grid for the nearest valid cells and randomly picks one.
icon: 深色网格上若干精确定位的彩色圆点，每个圆点带一根细线指向原始坐标位置，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: grid
inputs.label: 输入网格
inputs.description: 输入网格列表 (number[][][])，也支持单网格 (number[][]) 自动包装
inputs.description-en: Input list of 2D grids (number[][][]); single grid is auto-wrapped.

inputs.name: poiRules
inputs.label: POI规则列表
inputs.description: POI规则数组，**标准格式**为 [["名称", targetValue, [x1,y1], [x2,y2], ...], ...]，例如 [["洞穴入口",1,[10,20],[30,40]]]；也兼容旧格式 [{decoration, targetValue, points: [[x,y],...]}]
inputs.description-en: Array of POI rules; simplified [["name", targetValue, [x1,y1], ...], ...]; legacy [{decoration, targetValue, points}] also accepted.

inputs.name: minDistance
inputs.label: 最小间距
inputs.description: 所有POI点之间的最小格距（欧式距离），防止重叠堆积
inputs.description-en: Minimum cell distance between all placed POI points.

inputs.name: scatterR
inputs.label: 散播半径
inputs.description: 找到最近合法格后，在额外半径范围内随机散播（格数），0=精确就近
inputs.description-en: Extra radius for random scatter around the nearest valid cell (0 = exact snap).

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子，0表示使用当前时间自动随机

outputs.name: outputGridList
outputs.label: 输出网格列表
outputs.description: 单值网格的平铺列表：每种POI一张，仅含该id与0；与 outputNameList 一一对应
outputs.description-en: Flat list of single-value grids: one per POI type (only that id or 0); aligned 1:1 with outputNameList.

outputs.name: outputNameList
outputs.label: 名称清单
outputs.description: 与 outputGridList 一一对应的拍平名称清单，格式为 [{id, name, type}]，type 固定为 asset
outputs.description-en: Flat name list aligned 1:1 with outputGridList: [{id, name, type}], type is always "asset".

outputs.name: placedCount
outputs.label: 成功放置数量
outputs.description-en: Total number of POI points successfully placed.
